body_txt: Those characters that never show any emotion ? Or, if they do show emotion, it's always anger and/or despondency ? Yeah, every single one of them was at one point told to "cheer up a little". The result? Horrible. It can range from merely discomforting to downright Squick , as they just don't get it. Expect more or less horrified reactions from their friends. Sometimes appears alongside HA HA HA—No when they're especially not buying it. This trope is often accompanied by audible cracking , and always played for laughs. Not to be confused with Stepford Smiler , though they can overlap. May be the result of Finger-Forced Smile . Compare Slasher Smile , for when the smile goes from merely creepy to horrific, and Grin of Rage , when a person smiles when they're angry. See also Technically a Smile . Opposite of When She Smiles , where a smile is especially nice for a character who rarely shows it, though it can overlap if the times they do "smile" are usually forced, and their real smiles are way more warm, or if their "smile" has an Ugly Cute charm to it, especially if it's genuine and just how they smile. Compare and contrast Wistful Smile , when someone is genuinely sad and happy at the same time. See also "Oh, Crap!" Smile , where the smile is nervous in the face of getting in hot water, and Broken Smile , which is a Heroic BSoD combined with an empty smile. Here is a compilation with a lot of examples of this trope.
